scripts.name: Gmeet++
scripts.blurb: Auto-mute mic & cam on join, invert-colors button, random participant picker, and more for Google Meet

scripts.name: GitHub PR Load All Comments
scripts.blurb: Adds a "Load all!" button that expands every hidden conversation in a GitHub PR

scripts.name: GitHub PR Copy Diff
scripts.blurb: Adds a "Copy Diff" button to the PR nav that copies the unified diff to the clipboard

scripts.name: Langfinity Loby Defaults
scripts.blurb: Turns off mic & camera in the Langfinity lobby and remembers your last-used name

scripts.name: Slack AI Translate
scripts.blurb: Adds an English/Japanese translation button to Slack messages and the composer

scripts.name: Slack Auto-remove Preview
scripts.blurb: Automatically removes link previews on your own Slack messages

scripts.name: Google Emoji Blast
scripts.blurb: Adds a button to the Google home page that blasts emoji across the screen

scripts.name: Slack Quick Edit
scripts.blurb: Double-click your own Slack message to edit it (Cmd/Ctrl+Enter saves)

scripts.name: Slack Todo Emoji
scripts.blurb: Todo checkboxes in the Slack composer: double-click to add, click to cycle status, Tab indents, Enter continues the list

scripts.name: Slack Composer Char Count
scripts.blurb: Live character countdown in the Slack composer that warns before you hit the message limit

scripts.name: GitHub PR Copy Title + Link
scripts.blurb: Adds a button by the PR title that copies the title + PR link, ready to paste as a link in Slack, Notion, or markdown

scripts.name: Virtual Media Injector
scripts.blurb: Floating button that plays a pre-recorded video into your webcam and mic during a meeting, with live toggle back to your real camera

scripts.name: Gmeet Standup Roster
scripts.blurb: Marks who has talked in Google Meet's People panel - auto-detected from the audio indicator, with a manual toggle, for tracking daily standups

scripts.name: Slack DM Blur
scripts.blurb: Toggle in the Direct Messages header that blurs your DM feed and peek-card list so viewers can't read them while screensharing

scripts.name: Refined GitHub Preview Debanner
scripts.blurb: Remove the Refined GitHub HTML Preview warning banner on page load
